# Tarumak Studio — Complete AI Sitemap

> Full inventory of all tools and articles on tarumakstudio.com for AI assistants. For a short summary, see llms.txt.

## Image Tools

- [Image Compressor](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/image-compressor): Compress JPG, PNG and WebP images online — reduce file size by up to 80% with no visible quality loss. Free, browser-based, no uploads.
- [Image Resizer](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/image-resizer): Resize images to exact pixel dimensions or percentage online. Batch resize multiple images while keeping the original aspect ratio.
- [Image Cropper](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/image-cropper): Crop images online to any custom size or preset ratio (1:1, 16:9, 4:3). Preview before downloading — no software needed.
- [JPG to PNG Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/jpg-to-png): Convert JPG to PNG online for free. Preserve transparency and get lossless quality — instant conversion, no uploads.
- [PNG to JPG Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/png-to-jpg): Convert PNG to JPG online to reduce file size for web and email. Adjust quality level before downloading.
- [JPG to WebP Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/jpg-to-webp): Convert JPG to WebP online — get files 25–35% smaller than JPG with the same visual quality. Works in all modern browsers.
- [WebP to JPG Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/webp-to-jpg): Convert WebP images to JPG online for compatibility with older software, email clients and social media platforms.
- [PNG to WebP Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/png-to-webp): Convert PNG to WebP online and save up to 26% file size. Keeps transparency. Ideal for web performance and Core Web Vitals.
- [WebP to PNG Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/webp-to-png): Convert WebP to PNG for full compatibility with all image editors, design tools and platforms that do not yet support WebP.
- [SVG to PNG Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/svg-to-png): Convert SVG vector files to PNG at any resolution online. Set exact pixel width and height — perfect for app icons and assets.
- [SVG to JPG Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/svg-to-jpg): Convert SVG to JPG online with a white background. Choose output quality and dimensions for social media or print.
- [Image to PDF Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/image-to-pdf): Convert JPG or PNG images to a PDF document online. Combine multiple images into one PDF in seconds — no software needed.
- [Watermark Image Tool](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/watermark-image): Add a text or image watermark to photos online. Adjust opacity, size and position. Protect your images before sharing.
- [EXIF Data Remover](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/exif-remover): Remove EXIF metadata from photos to protect your privacy. Strips GPS location, camera model and timestamps from JPG files.
- [QR Code Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/qr-code-generator): Generate a free QR code for any URL, text, email or phone number. Download as high-resolution PNG — no sign-up required.

## PDF Tools

- [PDF Merger](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-merger): Merge multiple PDF files into one online for free. Drag to reorder pages before combining — no uploads, no sign-up.
- [PDF Splitter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-splitter): Split a PDF into separate pages or extract a specific page range online. Download as individual PDFs instantly.
- [PDF Compressor](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-compressor): Compress PDF file size online for free. Reduce large PDFs for email attachments and web uploads — all in your browser.
- [PDF to JPG Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-to-jpg): Convert PDF pages to JPG images online. Extract every page as a high-quality image — free, fast and private.
- [JPG to PDF Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/jpg-to-pdf): Convert JPG images to PDF online in seconds. Combine multiple JPGs into one PDF or convert individually.
- [PNG to PDF Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/png-to-pdf): Convert PNG images to PDF online. Preserves transparency as white background. Merge multiple PNGs into one document.
- [PDF to Text Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-to-text): Extract text from a PDF file online. Convert PDF to plain TXT for editing, copying or analysis — no software needed.
- [PDF Password Protector](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-password-protect): Add password protection to a PDF online. Encrypt your PDF before sharing to prevent unauthorised access.
- [PDF Unlock Tool](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-unlock): Remove password from a PDF online. Unlock a PDF you own to enable editing, printing and copying.
- [PDF Page Rotator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-page-rotator): Rotate PDF pages online — rotate individual pages or the entire document 90° or 180°. Download the corrected PDF.
- [PDF Page Remover](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-page-remover): Delete specific pages from a PDF online. Enter page numbers or ranges and download the PDF with those pages removed.
- [PDF Organizer](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-organizer): Reorder PDF pages online with drag-and-drop thumbnail view. Rearrange, rotate and preview before downloading.
- [Scan to PDF Tool](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/scan-to-pdf): Scan documents to PDF using your device camera. Capture multiple pages and merge them into a single PDF file.
- [Multiple Images to PDF](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/images-to-pdf): Convert multiple images to a single PDF online. Drag in JPG, PNG or WebP files, reorder them and download.
- [PDF Reader Web App](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-reader): Read and view PDF files online without downloading software. Navigate pages and zoom in — all in your browser.

## Converter Tools

- [TXT to PDF Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/txt-to-pdf): Convert plain text files to PDF online. Paste text or upload a .txt file and download a formatted PDF document.
- [HTML to PDF Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/html-to-pdf): Convert HTML to PDF online. Paste HTML code and generate a PDF document — useful for web page archiving.
- [GIF Maker](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/gif-maker): Create animated GIFs from multiple images online. Set frame duration and loop settings — free GIF creator in your browser.
- [GIF to WebP Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/gif-to-webp): Convert animated GIF to WebP online for smaller file sizes and better web performance. Keeps all animation frames.
- [WebP to GIF Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/webp-to-gif): Convert animated WebP to GIF for wider compatibility with older browsers, email clients and social platforms.
- [Color Picker from Image](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/color-picker): Pick and identify any color from an uploaded image. Get HEX, RGB and HSL values — free online eyedropper tool.
- [Image Collage Maker](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/image-collage): Create a photo collage online from multiple images. Choose grid layout, gaps and background color — download as PNG.
- [Favicon Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/favicon-generator): Generate favicons for your website from any image. Creates all required sizes (16x16 to 512x512) — free, instant.

- [Word to PDF Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/word-to-pdf): Convert .docx Word documents to PDF in your browser without uploading.
- [Markdown to HTML Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/markdown-to-html): Convert Markdown to clean HTML with live preview.
## Marketing Designer Tools

- [Social Media Image Resizer](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/social-image-resizer): Resize images for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube and 8 more platforms. Exact pixel dimensions, drag-to-crop.
- [Color Palette Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/color-palette-gen): Extract a color palette from any image or generate harmonious color schemes (complementary, triadic, analogous) from a base color.
- [Ad Copy Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/ad-copy-gen): Generate ad headlines, body copy and CTAs for Facebook, Google and Instagram ads. Template-based, no AI subscription needed.
- [CTA Button Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/cta-button-gen): Design CTA buttons with live preview. Adjust color, radius, size and padding — copy the CSS or download as PNG.
- [UTM Link Builder](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/utm-builder): Build UTM campaign URLs for Google Analytics 4. Track source, medium, campaign and content. Also decodes existing UTM links.
- [Open Graph Image Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/og-image-gen): Create Open Graph images (1200x630) for social media link previews. Add title, brand colors and logo — download as PNG.
- [PDF Lead Magnet Creator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/pdf-lead-magnet): Create professional PDF lead magnets — checklists, guides and cheatsheets — to grow your email list. Download instantly.
- [Brand Color Extractor](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/brand-color-extract): Extract brand colors from any logo or image. Get HEX, RGB and HSL values plus ready-to-paste CSS custom properties.

## Developer Tools

- [Word & Character Counter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences and reading time. Essential for bloggers, copywriters and SEO content creators.
- [Secure Password Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/password-generator): Generate strong random passwords with custom length, uppercase, numbers and symbols. Uses cryptographic randomness.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/css-gradient-gen): Create beautiful CSS linear and radial gradients with a live visual picker. Copy the ready-to-use CSS code.
- [Base64 Encoder & Decoder](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/base64-encoder): Encode text to Base64 and decode Base64 strings back to plain text. Essential for web developers and API work.
- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/json-formatter): Format, beautify and validate JSON data online. Minify JSON and highlight syntax errors with clear messages.
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/meta-tag-gen): Generate SEO title tags, meta descriptions and Open Graph tags for any web page. Copy-ready HTML output.
- [Hashtag Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/hashtag-gen): Generate targeted hashtags for Instagram, Twitter and LinkedIn from design, marketing, business and tech categories.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/lorem-ipsum): Generate placeholder text in paragraphs, sentences or words. Start with classic Lorem ipsum or use random text.
- [Color Code Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/color-converter): Convert between HEX, RGB and HSL color formats instantly. Click any result to copy to clipboard.
- [URL Encoder & Decoder](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/url-encoder): Encode special characters in URLs for safe transmission. Decode URL-encoded strings back to readable text.

- [Text Diff Checker](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/text-diff): Word-level comparison with highlighted changes.
- [Regex Tester](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/regex-tester): Real-time regular expression testing with match highlighting.
- [Slug Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/slug-generator): Text to URL slug converter.
- [Text Case Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/text-case-converter): 8 case format conversions.
- [Timestamp Converter](https://tarumakstudio.com/#/t/timestamp-converter): Live UNIX timestamp and date conversion.

### Image Tools

- [How to Remove Background From Image Free Online (No Photoshop)](https://tarumakstudio.com/article-remove-background-image-free.html): Remove image backgrounds online for free without Photoshop. Works for product photos, profile pictures, logos and more. Browser-based, no uploads.
- [20 Best Free Online Tools for Graphic Designers in 2026](https://tarumakstudio.com/article-best-free-tools-designers-2026.html): The best free browser-based tools for graphic designers in 2026 — image editors, PDF tools, color palette generators, and marketing design tools. No d
- [How to Add a Watermark to Photos Online — Protect Your Work](https://tarumakstudio.com/article-add-watermark-photos.html): Add a text or image watermark to photos online for free. Adjust opacity, position and size. Protect your photography and design work before sharing.

- [Open Graph Images: What They Are and How to Create One](https://tarumakstudio.com/article-what-is-open-graph-image.html): OG images are the preview images that appear when you share a link on social media. Here is how to make one that gets clicked.
- [How to Create a PDF Lead Magnet That Grows Your Email List](https://tarumakstudio.com/article-create-pdf-lead-magnet.html): A lead magnet is a free resource you offer in exchange for an email address. Here is how to create one in under 10 minutes.

### Developer Tools

### Converter Tools

- [How to Create an Animated GIF From Images Free Online](https://tarumakstudio.com/article-create-gif-from-images.html): Create animated GIFs from multiple images or video frames online. Set frame speed, loop settings and download instantly — no software, no sign-up.
- [How to Create a QR Code for Your Business — Free Generator](https://tarumakstudio.com/article-create-qr-code-business.html): Generate a free QR code for your website, menu, business card or social media. Download as high-resolution PNG. No sign-up, no watermarks.
